title: Glick Luxury Happy Birthday Pink Gift Bag - Small 140 x 140 x 60 mm. Beautiful Happy Birthday Gift Bag, Perfect for those Tiny Presents such as Jewellery, Pink
features: Luxury SMALL Gift Bags, Perfect for those Smaller Precious Gifts
Suitable for birthdays, these gift bags are very small and are suitable for those smaller presents.
You will find everything you need in our range of quality printed gift wrap, tags, bags, rolls, tissue and accessories
Printed on Quality 210 GSM. The size of this bag is SMALL and measures 14 cm x 14 cm x 6 cm depth
description: From the manufacturer So Many Designs Bottle Bags Glick has a wide range of Bottle Gift Bags. There are bottle bags, birthday bags, thank you's, weddings and other celebration gift bags. Junior Bags The Juniors range is colourful and bags come in a selection of sizes and designs. You will be able to find the bag you want! No matter what the child likes. Landscape Bags We have a large range of landscape Gift Bags for those gifts that are slightly wider than usual. Gift Bags Our Gift Bags come in a range of sizes from Mini through to Shopper, including these Plant Bags.
